title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: open-vm-tools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for open-vm-tools is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The Open Virtual Machine Tools are the open source implementation of the VMware Tools. They are a set of guest operating system virtualization components that enhance performance and user experience of virtual machines.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Backport of CVE-2025-22247 to 8.10 (JIRA:RHEL-129361)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for open-vm-tools is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The Open Virtual Machine Tools are the open source implementation of the VMware Tools. They are a set of guest operating system virtualization components that enhance performance and user experience of virtual machines.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Backport of CVE-2025-22247 to 8.10 (JIRA:RHEL-129361)
